name: Hustronix Daily Founder Outreach
description: Generate 5 ICP-matched founder DM drafts for human review. Never auto-send.

prompts.text: Run founder-outreach skill in D:\content. Generate 5 ICP-matched founder profiles and personalized LinkedIn DM drafts. Insert into founder_outreach table with status pending_review. Post batch to Slack #marketing-os for approval. NEVER auto-send messages.
